title: YouTube node execution forbidden due to credentials issue
symptom: When executing the YouTube node, n8n returns a 'Forbidden - perhaps check your credentials' error message, preventing the workflow from proceeding.
not_this_if: YouTube API is enabled in Google Cloud Console
root_cause: The error occurs because the YouTube API has not been enabled in the Google Cloud project associated with the OAuth2 credentials. Without enabling the API, the node cannot access the required resources, leading to a forbidden error.
fix_steps: Enable the YouTube Data API for your project
agent_instruction: Enable the YouTube Data API in your Google Cloud project to resolve the forbidden error.
